description.en: K-means made unsupervised grouping simple enough to become a default tool. Lloyd's method alternates between assigning points to nearest centers and moving centers to the mean of their assigned points, turning clustering into an intuitive optimization loop.
description.zh: K-means 让无监督分组简单到成为默认工具。劳埃德 方法在“把点分配给最近中心”和“把中心移动到所属点均值”之间交替，把聚类变成直观的优化循环。

subcaption.en: Bell Labs visual context for Lloyd-style quantization work.
subcaption.zh: 劳埃德 量化方法相关的贝尔实验室背景图。

caption.zh: 鸢尾花 k-means 聚类图

subcaption.zh: 公有领域的 k-means 聚类示意图。

subcaption.en: Original local explainer based on Least squares quantization in PCM.
subcaption.zh: 依据 PCM 中的最小二乘量化 制作的本地解释图。

sourceName.zh: PCM 中的最小二乘量化
